title: Simply More
description: An addon to Simply Swords by Sweenus which adds additional Weapon Types and Unique Weapons.
body:
# Introduction
Simply More is an addon for Simply Swords by Sweeney, acting to add more Weapon Types and Unique Weapons to the already large roster.

__DISCLAMER__ Whilst this mod is an addon for Simply Swords, it is not associated with Simply Swords or Timefall Development. I do not claim ownership of any of the original content from Simply Swords. All textures and models featured in this mod are independent content. This mod was made with permission.

# Content
![A display of the Weapon Types added in this mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zhpyD8Y0/images/053b73d742bf0eadca4b27bee0b3f43d934f6074.png)

Simply More adds 10 Weapon Types:

- Great Katanas
- Grandswords: Which can disable shields if someone tries to block.
- Backhand Blades
- Lances: Which gain a massive boost in strength if used while mounted.
- Khopeshs
- Daggers
- Pernachs
- Quarterstaffs
- Great Spears
- Deer Horns

Simply More also adds 33 Unique Weapons!

![A display of the Unique Weapons added in this mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zhpyD8Y0/images/d3ce6a54e838a56ed5e241f6a5300e2671c2a6f6.png)

## Required Mods

- [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) Version 1.55.0+
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) Version 11.1.106+
- [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) (Dependency of Simply Swords)

Additionally, Simply More has optional compatibility with the following mods:

- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) for special attack animations and combat changes.
__The weapons are balanced around this mod being enabled.__
- [Stick n' Stone](https://modrinth.com/mod/stick-n-stone) for wooden and stone variants of the weapons.
- [Mythic Metals](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals) for an additional 23 tiers of weapons.
- [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) for a book containing information about the weapons.

# Special Thanks

This mod wouldn't have been possible without the following people:

## NotSaneAshley
Created most of the art for the normal weapon types. Also created many of the ideas for many of the Unique Weapons.
## ScootifyZ
Created all of the art for the Mythic Metals compat. Also created some ideas for Unique Weapons.
## Sweeney
A Core Memeber of Timefall Development, the original creator of Simply Swords and the person who allowed me to make this mod. Sweeney also created the Simply More icon.
## Chronos_Sacaria
The Co-Founder of Timefall Development. Helped massively by rewriting my code to be more efficient and with licensing.
## Breadjesus45, JonaMost, The5 & Kayla
Created the ideas for several of the Unique Weapons.
